ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "year" INTEGER /* The year of the demographic data */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the geographic region */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender (e.g., male, female, other) */,
  "under_20" INTEGER /* Population count for individuals under 20 */,
  "age_20_29" INTEGER /* Population count for individuals aged 20-29 */,
  "age_30_39" INTEGER /* Population count for individuals aged 30-39 */,
  "age_40_49" INTEGER /* Population count for individuals aged 40-49 */,
  "age_50_69" INTEGER /* Population count for individuals aged 50-69 */,
  "age_70_and_over" INTEGER /* Population count for individuals 70 and over */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population for the year and region */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the demographic data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year", "region_id", "gender")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age in the group */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age in the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the demographic data used in the report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., trend analysis, summary) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES demographics ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the export */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the demographic data exported */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the exported data file */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was exported */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES demographics ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the import */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the demographic data imported */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the imported data file */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was imported */,
  "import_format" TEXT /* Format of the imported data (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES demographics ("year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the demographic data accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, export) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES demographics ("year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
